title: Smart Commit: Document startup window geometry
original_text: Updated README.md with instructions for changing the startup window position and size. Documented DEFAULT_WINDOW_GEOMETRY, MINIMUM_WINDOW_SIZE, the x/y/width/height order, and an example for opening the app wider and lower.
expected_body_lines: - Document x position, y position, width, and height order
- Add example geometry for a wider startup window
expected_command: git commit -m "docs(readme): document startup window geometry"
